national_indicator_available: Income of persons working in small-scale and part-time agricultural holdings
comparison_sdg: The time series is partly compliant with the UN metadata.
indicator_name: Average income of small-scale food producers, by sex and indigenous status
target_name: By 2030, double the agricultural productivity and incomes of small-scale food producers, in particular women, indigenous peoples, family farmers, pastoralists and fishers, including through secure and equal access to land, other productive resources and inputs, knowledge, financial services, markets and opportunities for value addition and non-farm employment
un_designated_tier_url_alert: der Statistischen Division der Vereinten Nationen
un_custodian_agency: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO)
goal_meta_link_alert: the Statistical Devision of the UN
source_organisation_1: Federal Ministry of Agriculture, Food and Regional Identity
source_url_text_1: Accounting results of agricultural test holdings: 2) Small-scale and part-time holdings (only available in German)
source_url_alert_1: the Federal Ministry of Agriculture, Food and Regional Identity
data_footnote: The data refer to a single agricultural and forestry financial year (1 July to 30 June).
graph_title: Income of persons working in small-scale and part-time agricultural holdings
data_last_update: Last updated on 2026/04/20. Data for further reporting periods will be added as soon as it becomes available.
